title: Remove redundant parentheses
description: Redundant parentheses that don't change code behavior or clarify intent add unnecessary complexity and can mislead developers about operator precedence. Clean code should only use parentheses when they serve a clear purpose.
recommendation: Remove parentheses that don't change behavior or improve readability.

noncompliant.description: Excessive parentheses that don't clarify operator precedence or improve readability add unnecessary complexity.

compliant.description: Using parentheses only when they clarify precedence or improve readability keeps code clean and understandable.

checks.message: Remove unnecessary parentheses around simple expressions.
